Safety Third

Welcome!

If you would like to come to Safety Third 2026 click the link below and RSVP to the Partiful event.
We ask that you contribute $40 to making the event possible but nobody will be turned away for lack of funds. The online payment system is still being set up.

S3 2026 RSVP Page

If you have any questions you can reach out to us at safetythird@fireflyartscollective.org
